board_csa_architect.notes: No schema/API impact. Pure CSS variable and Tailwind class fixes. Aligns with brand consistency and WCAG AA compliance goals.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Zero security impact. No auth/RLS/PII changes. CSS variables and Tailwind classes only. Improves a11y compliance which reduces legal risk.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI/VRAM impact. Code quality improvement: eliminates copy-paste color error and standardizes opacity patterns. XS effort, zero risk.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Zero ops risk. CSS-only changes dont affect deployment, monitoring, or runtime resilience. No new env vars, no service restarts needed.

board_red_team.notes: 3 failure scenarios documented: (1) contrast regression on bg-tertiary, (2) BrandThemeContext dynamic override is safe, (3) Safari brightness filter fallback. Condition: verify #a8b8cf on all 3 dark backgrounds before merge. STRIDE: all N/A (CSS-only).
